'''nalanga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:praecoracoid|praecoracoid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-l-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:praecoracoid|praecoracoid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| nalanga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nælængæth|nælængæth]] || [[word:nælængæj|nælængæj]] || [[word:nælængæsh|nælængæsh]] || [[word:nælængæ|nælængæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nalalangath|nalalangath]] || [[word:nalalangaj|nalalangaj]] || [[word:nalalangash|nalalangash]] || [[word:nalalanga|nalalanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nalangath|nalangath]] || [[word:nalangaj|nalangaj]] || [[word:nalangash|nalangash]] || [[word:nalanga|nalanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nalafngath|nalafngath]] || [[word:nalafngaj|nalafngaj]] || [[word:nalafngash|nalafngash]] || [[word:nalafngaf|nalafngaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nalangatha|nalangatha]] || [[word:nalangaja|nalangaja]] || [[word:nalangasha|nalangasha]] || [[word:nalangaka|nalangaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nalangath|nalangath]] || [[word:nalangaj|nalangaj]] || [[word:nalangash|nalangash]] || [[word:nalanga|nalanga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nalangathal|nalangathal]] || [[word:nalangajal|nalangajal]] || [[word:nalangashal|nalangashal]] || [[word:nalangakal|nalangakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nalangathatha|nalangathatha]] || [[word:nalangajaja|nalangajaja]] || [[word:nalangashasha|nalangashasha]] || [[word:nalangaka|nalangaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nalangathan|nalangathan]] || [[word:nalangajan|nalangajan]] || [[word:nalangashan|nalangashan]] || [[word:nalangakan|nalangakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nalangathaoro|nalangathaoro]] || [[word:nalangajaoro|nalangajaoro]] || [[word:nalangashaoro|nalangashaoro]] || [[word:nalangakaoro|nalangakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
